22144859.animalDescription:
Meet Bellota!

 

Bellota is a playful, friendly 5-month-old Akita mix who’s ready to find her forever home.

 

As a young, energetic pup, Bellota will thrive with an adopter who’s ready to invest time in positive-reinforcement training, socialization, and daily enrichment. Starting training now will help her grow into a well-mannered adult. Because of her size and typical puppy mouthiness, a home with dog-savvy teens (around 14+) may be a good fit, while younger children are not recommended at this time.

 

Bellota may be able to live with another dog, though this would need to be a thoughtful match. She’ll do best with someone who has some dog or large-breed experience and feels comfortable handling a strong, growing pup.

 

If you’re looking for a smart, affectionate puppy and are ready for the commitment of raising a young dog, Bellota could be a wonderful addition to your family. Come meet her at one of our upcoming adoption events and see if she’s the right match for you!

22144859.animalSpecialneedsDescription: [GREEN]Friendly, playful, energetic large breed puppy, will need continued appropriate socialization with new people, places and other animals, and positive reinforcement/rewards based training. Training should begin immediately before this puppy learns unwanted behaviors and becomes difficult to control. Dog savvy, respectful children 14+ may be okay; younger kids not recommended due to puppy's size and typical puppy mouthiness and sharp teeth. Adopter must be prepared for the time, energy, patience and commitment needed to raise and train a puppy, and be prepared for the exercise, socialization and mental enrichment needed by this breed. Breed experience or knowledge preferred.B Adopter must be physically capable of handling a strong large breed dog.[2025-12-24 11:55:00.000]
